title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. sphaerocarpa
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. sphaerocarpa, commonly known as Sphaerocarpa rose, is a variant of Rosa × dumetorum, a hybrid rose species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. sphaerocarpa include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
